subject: Unable to generate shipping labels
description: The dashboard fails whenever we try to generate shipping labels for bulk orders.

subject: Invoice amount looks incorrect
description: Our latest monthly invoice includes an amount that does not match our current plan usage.

comments.message: We corrected the invoice and shared the updated version.

subject: Need access for a new team member
description: A new designer joined our team and needs account access with the same project permissions.

comments.message: Waiting for role confirmation before provisioning access.

subject: Profile settings page loads very slowly
description: Several staff members reported that the profile settings screen takes too long to load during peak hours.

subject: Need clarification on refund process
description: Our finance team needs a clearer explanation of the refund flow for partially cancelled orders.

comments.message: Shared the refund policy and sample scenarios with the customer.

subject: Cannot update warehouse address
description: Saving the new warehouse address returns a generic error message without applying the change.

comments.message: We are checking the account settings service and will update you shortly.

subject: Course export CSV is missing columns
description: When exporting student performance reports, the generated CSV omits attendance and final grade columns.

subject: Question about annual billing upgrade
description: We want to move from monthly billing to annual billing and need pricing and migration details.
